# SukiStudy

SukiStudy is a Japanese study companion for WaniKani users. Public information about the
project is available on the home page and about page.

Allowed public pages:
- https://sukistudy.vercel.app/
- https://sukistudy.vercel.app/landing
- https://sukistudy.vercel.app/about

The home route and /landing route show the same public landing experience for users who
are not logged in.

Please do not crawl or index any other route, including application, account, settings,
session, subject, API, query-string, or arbitrary SPA fallback routes. These routes are
user-specific, dynamic, or not useful for public search and language-model indexing.

Source repository:
- https://github.com/mrdjohnson/SukiStudy
